instruction:
A survey of $1755$ people who took trips revealed that $163$ of them included a visit to a theme park. Based on those survery results, a management consultant claims that less than $10$ \% of trips include a theme park visit. Test this claim using the $\alpha=0.05$ significance level. The test statistic is [ANS]
The critical value is [ANS]
The conclusion is [ANS] A. There is sufficient evidence to support the claim that less than 10 \% of trips include a theme park visit.  B. There is not sufficient evidence to support the claim that less than 10 \% of trips include a theme park visit.
